name: UGC AI Ad
description: Paid-social UGC-style ads with a fictional creator, reference-image consistency, hook variants, ElevenLabs voice lock, and direct-response assembly.
best_for: product demo ads with a believable creator

stages.title: Ad brief and compliance
actions: Capture product, ICP, pain, CTA, allowed and banned claims
Confirm reference image rights for fictional creator derivation

stages.title: Hook variant matrix
actions: Write 5-8 hooks across confession, contrarian, demo-first families
Select 2-3 winners for first paid batch

stages.title: Fictional creator bible
actions: Build the creator-still prompt with the 12-part HYPERREALISTIC_IMAGE_SOP.md framework (skin texture, fabric-level wardrobe, lighting, anti-AI notes, negative prompt)
Edit reference into distinct fictional creator with gpt-image-2
Generate face, medium, and wide reference set
Save character_card.json with visual_seed and voice_id

stages.title: Seedance reference clips
actions: Generate beats with same seed and reference images
Vary only shot action and camera per beat
QC face drift and uncanny hands

stages.title: Voice and assembly
actions: Lock ElevenLabs voice for batch or use native Seedance audio intentionally
Assemble with jump cuts, large captions, product inserts, CTA close

stages.title: Variant export and QC
actions: Reject unverifiable claims and identity-level likeness

qc_checks: no fake testimonial unless user supplied
no identity recreation of reference person
compliance_notes: Fictional creator only with licensed or user-owned reference
No unverifiable income or health promises
